title: Masters 2026: Rory's defense, most disappointing first rounds and looking ahead to the rest of the tournament
content: How will a loaded leaderboard take shape? Will the course continue to get more difficult? We look at Round 1 and what could come next at Augusta National.

title: Pressure eased, Rory co-leads in Masters defense
content: Rory McIlroy did not, by his standards, play his best golf in the opening round yet still managed a 5-under 67, good for a share of the early lead with Sam Burns and his lowest opening round at the Masters since 2011.

title: Tatum clears hurdle, happy to exit MSG on '2 feet'
content: Jayson Tatum had 24 points, 13 rebounds and eight assists in 40 minutes Thursday night but, more importantly, walked "off the floor on my own two feet."

title: Sources: Aces agree to $1.19M deal with Young
content: The Aces are finalizing an agreement for four-time All-Star guard Jackie Young to return to Las Vegas, sources told ESPN on Thursday.

title: Final Four MOP Cadeau to return to Wolverines
content: Fresh off being named the Most Outstanding Player at the Final Four, star point guard Elliot Cadeau told ESPN's Pete Thamel on Thursday that he will return for his senior season at Michigan.

title: FIFA adds new, more expensive, WC ticket tiers
content: FIFA added new, even more expensive tiers of tickets for this year's World Cup, asking up to $4,105 for a front category 1 seat at the U.S. opener against Paraguay in Inglewood, California, on June 12.

title: Denver wins in 2OT, gets Wisc. in Frozen Four final
content: In a double-overtime classic, Denver's Kent Anderson scored the winning goal to stun Michigan 4-3 and send the Pioneers to Saturday's Frozen Four title game against Wisconsin.

title: Avs clinch NHL's top seed with 3-1 win vs. Flames
content: The Avalanche clinched the NHL's top seed for the postseason with a 3-1 win over the Flames on Thursday night.

title: Source: Cincinnati looking into move for Neymar
content: Neymar has emerged as the latest global soccer icon to draw interest from MLS, as FC Cincinnati has begun exploring options to bring the Santos star to the United States, a source told ESPN's Nathalia Ferrão.

title: MLB Power Rankings: Brewers, Pirates rise as Red Sox fall in Week 2
content: Teams with championship hopes are falling down our list while a number of surprising starts have boosted the status of other unexpected contenders in Week 2.

content: Scheffler might not generate the same buzz as players like Tiger and Phil, but he's a different kind of superstar, and maybe that's a good thing.

title: Maguire's remarkable Man United turnaround: 'It's made me stronger'
content: Fresh from signing a new deal at Manchester United, Harry Maguire opens up on some of the tougher times of his career at Old Trafford.

title: Dickie V's Dazzling Dozen: Players, performances, coaches that defined the season
content: Dick Vitale hands out superlatives for a season that had everything, from Diaper Dandies to Prime-Time Performers.

title: Max Verstappen's inner circle is unravelling -- and so are Red Bull's hopes of keeping him
content: The departure of Max Verstappen's longtime race engineer Gianpiero Lambiase will add fuel to the inferno that is building over the four-time world champion's immediate F1 future, writes ESPN's Nate Saunders.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Arsenal look to raise £100m from double exit
content: Myles Lewis-Skelly and Ethan Nwaneri are among five players who could be allowed to leave Arsenal. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Tourist from Netherlands forgets guitar in train in Mysuru, RPF helps her get it back
content: The Divisional Railway Manager (DRM) in Mysuru said the tourist had expressed her sincere appreciation for the timely assistance and professionalism of RPF, Mysuru

title: 15-year-old missing girl from Kerala found dead in Chikkamagaluru
content: Chikkamagaluru Superintendent of Police Jitendra Kumar Dayama told The Hindu that the body had been traced, and the clothes she was wearing were intact

title: Bihar Chief Minister Nitish Kumar takes oath as Rajya Sabha member
content: The oath was administered by Rajya Sabha chairman C.P. Radhakrishnan in his chamber at a brief ceremony

title: Protect traffic police from harsh weather in Bengaluru in summer; SPCA member urges immediate relief measures
content: In a letter addressed to the DG&IG of Police, SPCA member Mohan Kumar Danappa states that traffic police personnel are forced to perform their duties under direct sunlight, often without access to shade, leading to exhaustion, dehydration, and long-term health risks

title: Injured hawksbill turtle nursed back to health, transported 600 km by road, and released in Gulf of Mannar
content: On January 8, the juvenile hawksbill turtle was found stranded along the Neelankarai coast. The animal repeatedly washed back ashore despite multiple attempts to return it to the sea

title: Vijay’s ‘Jana Nayagan’ leaked online amid delayed release
content: Earlier, more than five-minutes of footage from the film surfaced on social media platforms, recorded reportedly from a test screening

title: Gujarat Police launch AI-powered tool to boost NDPS investigations, prosecution
content: The application has been developed by the Western Railway Police, Vadodara division, in collaboration with a Mumbai-based AI startup

title: Telangana HC grants one-week protection to Pawan Khera
content: The Telangana High Court directed Mr. Khera to approach local court concerned in Assam for regular bail after one week

title: Three Prakasam villages that beat water scarcity win national awards for rainwater harvesting
content: Murugummi, Marella, and Thangella in Prakasam district win national awards for rainwater harvesting under the Jal Sanchay Jan Bhagidari campaign

title: Gaganyaan mission: ISRO completes second Integrated Air Drop Test
content: Union Minister of State for Science and Technology Dr. Jitendra Singh announced the accomplishment of the IADT-02 in a post on X

title: PM Modi owes apology to women of India: Congress
content: Congress MP Jairam Ramesh demands PM Modi’s apology for delaying the implementation of the women’s reservation law

title: SC rejects plea to stop caste Census, slams petitioner for language used in PIL
content: The Bench dismissed the plea, which also sought a direction to the Centre to formulate policies to provide economic incentives to families with a single child

title: Kerala teen missing in Karnataka: Family camps in Chikkamagaluru as search continues
content: Police are investigating the possibility that the girl got separated from her group and mistakenly departed the site with other tourists.

title: Kerala elections: Post-poll violence continues in Kannur; house attacked; car set ablaze in Payyannur
content: While refraining from directly accusing the CPI(M), Mr. Purushothaman linked the incident to what he described as the growing influence of a “political mafia” in Payyannur.

title: Star Health data leak case: Madras High Court dismisses appeals by Punjab-based hacker
content: Chief Justice Sushrut Arvind Dharmadhikari and Justice G. Arul Murugan refuse to entertain six writ appeals filed by Himanshu Pathak

title: Organs from 35-year-old brain-dead woman in Kerala to save multiple lives
content: IT professional’s six organs, including her heart, liver, and kidneys, were harvested, with the heart destined for a 14-year-old girl in Malappuram.

title: Kerala Assembly elections 2026: Kollam records 76.27% polling
content: The day began with a modest start as the district recorded a 16.04% turnout in the first couple of hours, but the momentum shifted rapidly as the morning progressed

title: President Murmu nominates Harivansh to Rajya Sabha
content: He has been nominated as a member of the Rajya Sabha after the vacancy was created following the retirement of former Chief Justice of India Ranjan Gogoi

title: At least 6 killed, 3 injured as two cars collide in Chhattisgarh’s Kanker
content: Six persons, including three women, a child and two men, died on the spot in one car, while another passenger was seriously injured

title: Kerala deploys AI surveillance for polls; real-time alerts track queues, crowd at booths
content: Live webcasting has been arranged in all polling stations for the April 9 polls. Each station has two cameras each, placed inside the station and outside it

title: From mass conferences to digital platforms: the DMK’s 77-year journey
content: Largely dependent on the charisma and eloquence of its founder, C.N. Annadurai, the DMK also had an array of articulate leaders, backed by an enviable organisational structure

title: Root canal treatment included in Ayushman Bharat-Arogya Karnataka scheme
content: A Government Order issued on April 8 provides for the addition of specific procedure codes for root canal treatment under the Dental and Oral and Maxillofacial Surgery specialty of the scheme.

title: Rahul Gandhi promises to end ‘discriminatory system’ in CAPF leadership
content: Rahul Gandhi says Central Armed Police Forces personnel should lead their own forces; vows reforms on promotions, pay and leadership roles

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: Brisk polling in Kottayam, Pathanamthitta districts
content: Kottayam records a polling percentage of 74.60%, up from 72.13% in 2021. In Pathanamthitta, the overall polling percentage stands at 70.76%, up from 69.64% in 2021

title: Proceedings are without jurisdiction: Kunal Kamra tells Maharashtra legislature’s privilege committee
content: Mr. Kamra, taking a dig at Mr. Shinde, said that defending Balasaheb Thackeray’s political legacy would extend to protecting the freedom of cartoonists and satirists

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Commotion at Thrissur booth as woman with bandaged index finger denied permission to vote
content: Following hours-long standoff and protests, she was allowed to vote post 6 p.m. after submitting an affidavit

title: CPI(M) flags ‘mass disenfranchisement’ in West Bengal, urges EC to safeguard voting rights
content: In a letter to Chief Election Commissioner, CPI(M) General Secretary M.A. Baby alleges that the Special Intensive Revision led to the deletion of over 90 lakh voters from the electoral rolls in West Bengal

title: From the margins to momentum: the BJP’s electoral journey in Tamil Nadu
content: The BJP initially capitalised on Hindutva politics in Kanniyakumari, winning its first Assembly seat in 1996; thereafter it tasted success only in alliance with the Dravidian majors; hopes to convert its rising vote share to more seats in 2026

title: High enthusiasm, long queues mark polling as Puducherry shatters record
content: There were no major complaints pertaining to polling process; however, there were allegations of voter inducement and reports of minor scuffles from two constituencies during the early hours of polling.

title: Thirty years on, Akshaya Kshetram is home to 100 persons with intellectual disabilities
content: Akshaya Kshetram, a home for persons with intellectual disabilities near Tirumala, turns 30 and plans outreach activities and an awareness walk

title: Bid to clean up a rotten trail in Hyderabad’s thriving food scene
content: Beneath Hyderabad’s booming food economy lies a dark web of adulteration, mislabelling and unsafe practices. Of late, an unprecedented police-led crackdown is pulling back the curtain on a sprawling food fraud network that thrives on gaps in regulation and consumer trust. But as enforcement tightens and complaints surge, the city finds itself trying not just to fix a broken food chain, but also to restore faith in what lands on every plate, write Serish Nanisetti and Lavpreet Kaur

title: Watch: Sabarimala women entry case: What happened in the Supreme Court?
content: The Sabarimala case is back in the Supreme Court, and this time, the debate has taken a sharp turn. During Wednesday’s hearing, the Centre told the court that some of its most progressive judgments may actually be “not good law.” And at the heart of this argument lies one question: how much power should courts really have over religion? What were the three arguments posed by Solicitor General Tushar Mehta? What is the Sabarimala women entry case all about?

title: Kerala HC rejects plea by father of Venjaramoodu mass murder accused against movie
content: Justice Bechu Kurian Thomas rejected the plea of Abdal Rahim who claimed that the movie is based on the incident

title: Karnataka High Court quashes FIR against drone development company, cautions police against not giving FIRs to accused
content: A case was registered after the police control room received information that a drone was found lying on a vacant plot of land

title: Two killed, three injured in SUV-motorcycle collision near Madanapalle in Annamayya
content: An SUV collided with a motorcycle near Madanapalle in Annamayya district, killing two persons and injuring three others, police said.

title: Who posted ‘Zombie Drug’ video online: Bengaluru police want to know
content: ‘Zombie Drug’ panic puts Bengaluru police on trail of person who uploaded video, spread false information

title: India finalising agreement to supply oil, gas to Mauritius amid West Asia crisis: Jaishankar
content: The West Asia war and Iran’s chokehold of the Strait of Hormuz, a vital waterway through which a fifth of global oil passes, had halted shipping and sent global oil prices soaring

title: Marco Rubio’s visit to India announced after U.S. top diplomat’s meeting with Foreign Secretary Vikram Misri
content: Vikram Misri and the U.S. Secretary of State Rubio reviewed bilateral relationships, especially trade, critical minerals, defence and the Quad

title: Census 2027: Self-enumeration facility availed by 5.72 lakh households so far in first phase
content: The self-enumeration facility is available to citizens in States and Union Territories which will start physical Houselisting and Housing Census (HLO) from April 16

title: Double murder in Bihar, but BJP, JD(U) vying for CM seat: Tejashwi
content: My appeal is that in the game of musical chairs, the BJP-JD(U) government should not murder the rights, demands, aspirations, hopes, and dreams of lakhs of youth of Bihar, says RJD leader

title: Reining in medicine prices despite war impact on pharma inputs: Official
content: Propylene remains the most critical input since it is used in Isopropyl Alcohol (IPA) and Isobutyl Benzene production, which are used in medicines such as Ibuprofen

title: Scooter thief traced after challan evidence image goes viral on social media
content: The case had drawn widespread attention after a traffic challan issued months after the theft revealed a clear image of the alleged thief

title: The simple, spiritual living in Andhra’s Kurma Gramam village
content: Nestled amidst the scenic hills of Hiramandalam in Andhra Pradesh, Kurma Gramam is a tiny hamlet, spread across 60 acres and inhabited by 17 families that stands in contrast to modern lifestyles. Cut off from the contemporary living, the village functions without electricity, mobile phones, internet connectivity or even LPG services. Life here moves at a slower pace, deeply rooted in simplicity and spiritual discipline, writes Harish Gilai

title: "With Deep Anguish": Full Text Of Justice Yashwant Varma's Resignation Letter
content: While refusing to venture into the "reasons which have constrained me to submit this missive", Jsutice Varma said it has been an honour to serve in the office.

title: Why Egypt Can Charge Fee In Suez Canal, But Iran's Hormuz Fee Is Illegal
content: The United Nations Convention on the Law of the Sea (UNCLOS), which governs international sea law, says that countries bordering straits cannot demand payment simply for permission to pass through.

title: "Low IQs, Stupid People": Trump Mocks Tucker Carlson, Other Right-Wingers Over Iran War Stance
content: Trump slammed Tucker Carlson and Megyn Kelly - two former Fox News hosts - as well as Candace Owens and Alex Jones, two podcasters in his latest social media post.

title: How Congress' Baramati Withdrawal Is A Well-Planned Political Strategy
content: By fielding a candidate in Baramati, the Congress had initially signalled clearly that it would not back down from its ideological stance against the BJP-led 'Mahayuti' alliance.

title: Opinion: Opinion | Skill Issues? Why The World's Strongest Military Keeps Messing Up Its Wars
content: This has been primarily an outcome of Washington's inability to effectively combine military capacity with political acumen.

title: 46% Of People In France Experienced Racism: Study
content: The report, which was focused on mapping “French people's exposure to racist behaviours", interviewed 14,025 people aged 15 and older between August and September 2025.

title: Man In 'Trance' On Bengaluru Road Sparks 'Zombie Drug' Buzz, Cops Respond
content: People claimed the man might be under the influence of a synthetic "zombie drug" and expressed concerns about its availability in Bengaluru.

title: Ukraine Downed Shahed Drones In Middle East During Iran War, Says Zelensky
content: Zelensky made his first public acknowledgment of the operations Wednesday in remarks to reporters that were embargoed until Friday.

title: Stock Market LIVE Updates, Sensex Today: Sensex Climbs 600 Points On Hopes Of US-Iran Peace Talks
content: Stock Market, Sensex, Share Market, Nifty LIVE Updates: Overnight, US markets closed sharply higher. Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 2.85 per cent.

title: Andhra Pradesh Government Withdraws LuLu Group Land Allotment Amid Controversy
content: Andhra Pradesh government withdraws 4.15-acre land allotment to LuLu Group in Vijayawada amid controversy

title: What's MMIWG2SLGBTQQIA+, Why 'Woke' Canadian MP Is Being Trolled Over It
content: MMIWG2SLGBTQQIA+ is an acronym used in Canada to describe a wide group of people affected by systemic violence.

content: Aadhav Arjuna faces a determined challenge from DMK's Karthik Mohan, the son of a sitting MLA from Anna Nagar.

title: Throwback 1993: Mamata Banerjee Made A Vow, Then Kept It For 18 Years
content: Mamata Banerjee had just been released from the lock-up, and the dead of the night gave her the much-needed moment of solitude.

title: How 7 Women Cops In Disguise Blew The Lid Off Sex Harassment At Nashik Firm
content: The case pertain to the alleged sex harassment of women employees at a multi-national company in Nashik over the last four years.

title: Punjab Police Arrest Main Accused In Punjabi Influencer Kamal Kaur's Murder
content: Punjab Police arrested Amritpal Singh Mehron, main accused in social media influencer Kanchan Kumari murder case.

title: Artemis II Astronauts To Re-Enter Earth's Atmosphere Today After 10-Day Mission
content: If all goes well, US astronauts Reid Wiseman, Victor Glover and Christina Koch, along with Canadian astronaut Jeremy Hansen, will end up bobbing safely in the ocean aboard their Orion capsule, dubbed Integrity, shortly after 8 pm ET

title: Army Jawan Alleges Assault By Samajwadi Party MLA Supporters Over PM Remarks
content: Army jawan alleges assault by Samajwadi Party MLA supporters after protesting remarks against PM Modi.

title: Cash recovery row: Justice Yashwant Varma resigns amid impeachment process
content: Justice Yashwant Varma has resigned from his post following a cash recovery controversy and impeachment proceedings. Allegations of unaccounted cash surfaced after a fire at his residence, prompting a Supreme Court inquiry and subsequent parliamentary action. The judge had previously questioned the constitutionality of the inquiry process.

title: ‘Did nothing wrong’: Threat backlash forces Shreyas' sister to delete viral video
content: Shresta Iyer, sister of India cricketer Shreyas Iyer, removed a viral social media video after receiving threats. She stated her "light-hearted banter" about a washed-out match between PBKS and KKR was misunderstood. Despite clarifying her intent was supportive and not hateful, she deleted the clip to prevent negativity and urged for kindness.

title: 'Tum kaale ho, mujhe deserve nahi karte': Wife plots husband murder with lover
content: A man's death in Madhya Pradesh, initially reported as a robbery, has been revealed as a planned murder. His wife, Priyanka, allegedly conspired with her lover, Kamlesh, to kill her husband due to marital discord and humiliation. Kamlesh reportedly paid Rs 1 lakh to an accomplice for the execution.

title: Google DeepMind CEO explains what the company did to catch up with rivals
content: Google DeepMind's CEO revealed a strategic shift, adopting a startup-like approach to regain AI leadership. By consolidating fragmented teams and boosting compute access post-merger, the lab aims to accelerate innovation. This move is crucial in a fiercely competitive landscape, as Google aims to leverage its historical AI contributions to stay ahead.

title: Will RBI’s move to stop rupee’s free fall backfire? What experts say
content: The sudden nature of the measures and tighter controls risk creating an impression that India may be stepping back from its efforts to deepen integration with global financial markets.

title: Babar surpasses Virat to script history, silences critics to become fastest to...
content: Babar Azam silenced critics by becoming the fastest T20 player to 12,000 runs in just 338 innings, surpassing Chris Gayle.  He achieved this milestone during a dominant performance for Peshawar Zalmi in the PSL, remaining unbeaten on 87.  This record-breaking feat came after Azam expressed frustration over comparisons with Virat Kohli.

title: We are quite upfront: Meta AI head on Muse Spark AI model 'disappointment'
content: Meta's new AI model, Muse Spark, powering its AI assistant, has drawn criticism for prioritizing benchmarks over real-world utility.  While Meta acknowledges performance gaps, it highlights user satisfaction in areas like visual coding and reasoning.  This initial model, designed for speed and capability, is set to power Meta's platforms soon.

title: ‘Dhurandhar 2’ earns Rs 1,665 cr in 3 weeks, misses ‘Dhurandhar’ record
content: 'Dhurandhar 2' experiences a slowdown, concluding its third week with Rs 110.60 crore. Despite surpassing its predecessor's lifetime earnings, the spy action film failed to break 'Dhurandhar's' third-week collection record. The movie's domestic net collections reached Rs 1,048.42 crore, with a global gross of Rs 1,665.23 crore.

title: Explained: Why Anthropic is holding back Claude Mythos from public release
content: AI giant Anthropic has withheld its powerful new model, Claude Mythos Preview, due to fears of destabilizing cybersecurity. The model can autonomously find and analyze software vulnerabilities at scale, potentially enabling even non-specialists to exploit sophisticated flaws. Anthropic is instead offering controlled access to select partners for defensive purposes.

title: NOC denied, LSG's Rs 2 Cr star out of IPL 2026; South African player in radar
content: Lucknow Super Giants face a significant blow as star all-rounder Wanindu Hasaranga is out of IPL 2026 due to injury. South African spinner George Linde is the likely replacement. Despite this setback, LSG secured a thrilling last-ball victory against KKR, with Ayush Badoni and Mukul Choudhary starring in the chase.

title: Why is stock market up? Nifty50 crosses 24,000; Sensex up over 800 points - top reasons
content: Stock market today: Indian equity benchmarks, Sensex and Nifty50, opened in green in trade on Friday after a day of losses on Thursday. While Nifty50 went above 23,900, BSE Sensex was up over 400 points, crossing the 77,000 mark.

title: BITSAT 2026 admit card releasing shortly: Check steps to download hall ticket here
content: BITS Pilani is releasing the BITSAT 2026 admit card today, April 10, for Session 1, available until April 13.  Exams are scheduled for April 15-16.  Candidates can download their hall tickets from the official website by entering their application details.  Ensure you carry a printout and valid ID to the exam centre.

title: Controlled movement, crypto tolls: Strait of Hormuz under new order — what has changed
content: Global energy flows are severely restricted through the Strait of Hormuz following a fragile ceasefire. Iran has imposed a strict 15-vessel daily limit, demanding prior approval and rerouting ships closer to its coast. This controlled transit, coupled with threat warnings and potential crypto tolls, creates significant uncertainty and delays for vital oil and gas supplies.

title: 'Will get your mother killed': ICICI Bank officer's wife, driver lover held in murder plot
content: Alwar police have arrested Archana Arora, wife of an ICICI Bank regional head, and her alleged lover, Rishabh Sharma, for conspiring to kill her husband. The complaint details an illicit relationship, alleged theft of valuables, and an attempted murder. Archana later retracted a rape accusation against Rishabh, then allegedly threatened her husband for more money.

title: Tamil Nadu CM Stalin takes Chennai Metro during poll campaign, interacts with commuters
content: Tamil Nadu CM M.K. Stalin took a Chennai Metro ride, engaging with commuters to seek support for his party ahead of the Assembly polls. He recalled his role in developing the metro project, highlighting its progress and future expansion plans. This public outreach is part of his intensified campaign efforts.

title: 'Jana Nayagan' 5-minute clip leaked online; fans react
content: Thalapathy Vijay's final film, 'Jana Nayagan,' faces a setback as a five-minute clip, including title credits and his introduction, has leaked online, sparking fan outrage. The movie, already delayed due to CBFC issues, has seen its release date postponed indefinitely. Fans expressed disappointment and urged against sharing the leaked footage.

title: ‘Scariest batter in India’: Langer’s prophecy on Mukul Choudhary comes true — Watch
content: Mukul Choudhary delivered a stunning match-winning performance for Lucknow Super Giants in IPL 2026. His unbeaten 54 off 27 balls secured a dramatic three-wicket victory. This feat fulfilled a prophecy made by head coach Justin Langer. Choudhary's journey from humble beginnings to IPL hero is a testament to belief and sacrifice. His fearless approach at the crease captivated audiences.

title: Mumbai airport drama: 26 Kenyans try to ditch Rs 37.7 cr gold, then start dumping it
content: DRI apprehended 26 Kenyan nationals at Mumbai airport for smuggling 29.4kg of gold, valued at Rs 37.7 crore, from Nairobi. Officials intercepted the group after they attempted to evade them near the green channel. Gold bars were recovered from the suspects' shoes and discarded pouches.

title: Oil prices today: Crude climbs amid attack on Saudi facilities; US-Iran ceasefire on edge
content: Oil prices surged Friday as Brent Crude surpassed $96 and WTI neared $99 a barrel, driven by renewed Middle East supply risks. Attacks on Saudi energy infrastructure and ongoing uncertainty around the Strait of Hormuz have disrupted production and added a significant risk premium to global markets.

title: Tamil Nadu polls: Sasikala takes front seat, invokes Jaya's name & style
content: V.K. Sasikala, once Jayalalithaa's shadow, now leads her own campaign from a similar vehicle, evoking memories of the late leader's roadshows.  She delivers short speeches, indirectly criticizing AIADMK leaders and seeking public support, while her party fields candidates, primarily in southern districts, aiming for crucial votes and recalling her close association with Jayalalithaa.

title: Ranveer Singh hails 'Dhurandhar 2' makeup artist Preetisheel Singh
content: Ranveer Singh lauded makeup artist Preetisheel Singh for her pivotal role in 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge'. He described her as a 'pillar' of the film and an 'icon' of the industry, expressing gratitude for their collaboration. Director Aditya Dhar also praised Preetisheel's dedication to creating authentic characters, highlighting her respect for each individual's story. Read on to know more in detail.

title: RR vs RCB: Can Royal Challengers keep Vaibhav Sooryavanshi in check?
content: Rajasthan Royals are enjoying a stellar season, with 15-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi impressing everyone, including coach Shane Bond. Opening partner Yashasvi Jaiswal also shines, holding the Orange Cap. However, they face a formidable challenge against the in-form defending champions Royal Challengers Bengaluru, led by Virat Kohli and featuring a strong batting and bowling attack.

title: AIMIM ends alliance in Bengal: Party snaps tie with Humayun Kabir; eyes solo run
content: Ahead of West Bengal polls, Asaduddin Owaisi's AIMIM has ended its alliance with Humayun Kabir's party, citing concerns over remarks questioning Muslim integrity. AIMIM will now contest independently, aiming to provide a voice for marginalized communities. The move could influence constituencies with significant minority populations, potentially creating multi-cornered contests.

title: Kangana Ranaut reacts to Ram Gopal Varma's 'Dhurandhar 2' post, drops birthday pic
content: Filmmaker Ram Gopal Varma celebrated his birthday with a star-studded party in Mumbai. He marked the occasion by cutting a cake featuring his iconic films and praised Aditya Dhar's 'Dhurandhar2' as a "surgical warfare on celluloid," calling Dhar his new 'guru' and a textbook for aspiring filmmakers.

title: 27 lakh out of Bengal rolls after adjudication, maximum from Muslim, Matua belts
content: Murshidabad's Shamsherganj and Lalgola constituencies saw the highest voter deletions post-adjudication, with 74,775 and 55,420 names removed respectively. This comes amidst a larger purge of 27 lakh voters across Bengal, sparking concerns and protests, particularly in Muslim-dominant and Matua-dominated areas. Electoral rolls for the second phase have been frozen, with a court review pending.

title: Mukul Choudhary, Avesh Khan script history with record stand in LSG’s last-ball heist
content: Mukul Choudhary and Avesh Khan's record-breaking 54-run partnership for the eighth wicket secured a thrilling three-wicket victory for Lucknow Super Giants against Kolkata Knight Riders.  Chasing 182, LSG were in trouble at 128/7 before Choudhary's explosive hitting, including seven sixes, and Khan's support sealed the win on the final ball, marking KKR's struggles at the death.

title: Foreign secy Vikram Misri meets Marco Rubio, Kash Patel in Washington: Key takeaways
content: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio will visit India next month following productive talks with Foreign Secretary Vikram Misri in Washington. Discussions focused on strengthening the bilateral partnership, particularly in trade, defence, critical minerals, and the Quad. Both nations aim to deepen engagement across these vital sectors, enhancing their Comprehensive Global Strategic Partnership.

title: Watch: Goenka’s emotional hug for Mukul Choudhary goes viral after LSG win
content: Lucknow Super Giants secured a dramatic last-ball victory against Kolkata Knight Riders, with young Mukul Choudhary scripting a sensational unbeaten 54 off 27 balls. The thrilling chase culminated in an emotional embrace between Choudhary and LSG owner Sanjiv Goenka, a moment that resonated widely and highlighted the team's burgeoning talent and spirit.

title: 'Did not introduce me to Donald Trump': Melania rejects Epstein connection, calls out 'lies'
content: First Lady Melania Trump has issued a rare public statement, firmly denying any connection to Jeffrey Epstein and refuting claims that he introduced her to President Donald Trump. She stated she has no knowledge of Epstein's abuse and was never involved with him, nor did she visit his island or travel on his plane.

title: 'Will advance management of Hormuz to new stage': Khamenei flags shift amid fragile truce
content: Iran's new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei has vowed to escalate control over the Strait of Hormuz, signaling a tougher stance amid a strained ceasefire with the US and Israel. He declared Iran would seek compensation for wartime losses and warned aggressors would not go unpunished. Khamenei also claimed victory in the conflict, urging continued public pressure during ongoing negotiations.

title: Struggling to keep your indoor plants alive? 5 houseplants that thrive with minimal care
content: Gardening expert shares five resilient houseplants ideal for beginners.  These plants, including snake plants, pothos, ZZ plants, spider plants, and peace lilies, thrive with minimal care.  Martin emphasizes that starting with hardy varieties builds confidence for aspiring plant owners.  These forgiving plants offer a successful entry into houseplant ownership, making it easier to keep them alive.

title: Top shares to buy: Stock recommendations for today - check list
content: Stock market recommendations: IndusInd Bank, and IIFL Finance - these are the two stocks that Bajaj Broking Research has recommended for buying today with a one month time horizon. The brokerage has also shared its views and outlook for Nifty, and Bank Nifty.

title: Masters tiers: Ranking all 91 players in the field
content: for the first time in his career, Rory McIlroy will drive down Magnolia Lane this week as a Masters champion . a year ago, he made a 4-foot birdie putt on the 18th hole to defeat england's Justin Rose on the first hole of a sudden-death playoff . with his long-awaited Masters victory, Mcilroy became only the sixth golfer to complete the career Grand Slam .

title: Pochettino's to-do list: What the USMNT must figure out before World Cup
content: Mauricio Pochettino will have a pre-World Cup camp to get his side ready for competition . he'll have to lock in his choices on which players will join him in the world cup cauldron . the men's national team are ranked outside the top 20 contenders to win the 2026 world cup .

title: Way-Too-Early Top 25: Ranking the best teams for next season, now
content: the 2026-27 college basketball season is expected to take place in 2026 . we're already rolling right into the "offseason," which mostly involves rampant roster changes for the next six weeks . in the past, we've had pretty hard-and-fast house rules regarding the Way-Too-Early Top 25 .

title: Stick or sack? Slot's Liverpool future dominates UCL talking points
content: the UEFA Champions League quarterfinals kicked off this week . arsenal beat Sporting CP 1-0 thanks to an injury-time goal . real madrid and bayern munich traded punches and shots for 90 minutes .

title: Women's transfer rankings for 2026-27 season
content: the women's college basketball transfer portal opened Monday with a tidal wave of activity . more than 1,300 players are looking for new homes . the portal closes April 20 but players' decisions for their next school can still come after that .

title: 2026 NBA draft top 100: Where top prospects land on the big board after March
content: yaxel Lendeborg wins a national championship with Michigan . AJ Dybantsa takes that mantle as the dust has settled on the season . the top of the draft remains open for discussion, with a group of talented players still jockeying for position in the lottery .

title: Ranking the top 50 men's basketball players to enter transfer portal
content: more than 1,000 men's basketball players have added their names to the transfer portal . most coaches expect this season's portal entrants to surpass the 3,000 mark . the NCAA enacted rule changes earlier this year that changed the window in all sports .

title: Back to the future: Repicking the 2016 NHL draft
content: it has been almost 10 years since the 2016 NHL draft was held in Buffalo . the team reshuffled the picks with hindsight, taking into account what teams were looking for at the time and how these players have performed for the past decade . Rachel Kryshak: I was watching my childhood team tear things up in hopes of getting an elite goal scorer .

title: NBA teams all want to play faster -- but it might be making them worse
content: a record 18 teams are averaging at least 100 possessions per game . the new york Knicks wanted to play faster this season . they wanted to trade the dance team, concession workers and anyone besides Jalen Brunson to the Bucks .

title: Meet the newest source for steals in Chicago
content: the fantasy baseball buzz file aims to provide fantasy managers with the intel they need as news breaks around MLB . the six-game slate kicks off at 12:10 p.m. ET with the Miami Marlins hosting the Cincinnati Reds .

title: WNBA free agency and trade tracker: Latest deals and news
content: the WNBA and players' association verbally agreed to a new collective bargaining agreement on march 18 . the league would have to conduct an expansion draft, free agency and the draft in a compressed offseason before the 30th season tips off May 8 . players can officially sign contracts beginning Saturday .

title: Coaches, GMs weigh in on SEC's top newcomers
content: new faces will be announced all over the SEC in 2026 . coaches, general managers and personnel staffers selected one newcomer for each SEC team with a path to immediate contribution . RB Ezavier and RB ezavier are among the players to add to the roster .

title: Roman Reigns' Top 10 WrestleMania main events: Which match finished No. 1?
content: Roman Reigns will challenge CM Punk at WrestleMania 42 Night 2 on April 18 at Allegiant Stadium in Las Vegas for the world heavyweight championship in his 11th main event . he defeated Brock Lesnar at the "Winner Take All" main event between lesnar and thera .

title: 🏀 WNBA mock draft: New projected No. 1
content: Olivia Miles drops 28 points, 10 rebounds and eight assists as TCU puts away Virginia 79-69 . the college players available in Monday's draft had one last audition in the tournament . in our latest WNBA mock draft, for example, Miles projected as a lottery pick last season when she was eligible age-wise .

title: Sights and sounds from the first round of the Masters
content: the 90th edition of the Masters began Thursday, kicking off the first golf major of the year . the first round of the tournament began on augusta national . a slam-dunk birdie on no. 14 to reach four under par .
